case_title: DANBY KIM VS. MEI YIN FONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY KIM, DANBY AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, MEI YIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, DANBY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($10.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED AUG-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, MEI YIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2012 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO SEP-13-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2012 - CONTINUED TO SEP-13-2012 AT 4:30 PM IN DEPT. 608, JUDGE KARNOW. (506)

NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. TRIAL IS HELD. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-13-2012 AT 4:30 PM. JUDGE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, MEI YIN MATTER WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AND A JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE WAS ISSUED DUE TO INSUFFICIENT SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
